Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...Which is what I believe to be the proper way to wear one's uniform. Please keep these things in consideration.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm not saying everyone should follow this to the letter, so we'll leave it to the discretion of the individual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Holy crap, did that just come out of his mouth?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I think this is the first time he's cared about anyone else's opinions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Well, at least he's trying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Thank you, {f 4 1}-kun. I couldn't have done it without you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}So, how did I do? What'd everyone think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 5 15 102}I'm proud of myself for making an effort at the very least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 5 5 102}Thanks, hearing that takes a huge weight off my shoulders.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I may have painted a selfish, arrogant portrait of myself to everyone, so I'll have to win back their trust.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}One of the guys fessed up about the cigarette butt in the boys' bathroom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It took a lot of persuasion, but he promised me he'll never smoke again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}This lighter is proof of that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I earned his trust by showing compassion for others, just like you taught me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That's why you should be the one to have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I've spent my whole life looking down on others. Such baseless bravado...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But you taught me an important lesson, something I'll carry with me forever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I don't think I'll ever be anything like you, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Odagiri seems embarrassed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond with Odagiri.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Emperor Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Odin{f 0 1 27}, the storm god![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Do you remember the story I told you about the TV station's writer?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I see now that sincerity is important, and I'm proud of myself for understanding that. I also realized what an amazing man my father is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Say, {f 4 1}-kun. Do you want to stop by somewhere before we head home?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Now that I think about it, we've never hung out outside of school before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I walked home with Odagiri,[n]who was in a great mood.[n]{f 1 1}
